title: Manual Wastewater Concentration and Extraction V1.0
author: Allison Steedman
materials: Ceres Nanotrap Microbiome A Particle beads

steps.title: Invert wastewater sample to mix
steps.instruction: Invert wastewater sample to mix

steps.title: Aliquot 10mL of wastewater into a 15mL conical tube
steps.instruction: Aliquot 10mL of wastewater into a 15mL conical tube

steps.title: Pipette off the supernatant without disturbing the bead pellet
steps.instruction: Pipette off the supernatant without disturbing the bead pellet

steps.title: Place 15mL conical on magnetic stand...
steps.instruction: Place 15mL conical on magnetic stand for 5 minutes or until beads are fully separated

steps.title: Incubate at room temp for 15...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temp for 15 minutes on slow shaker (or invert every 5 minutes)

steps.title: Add 150ul Ceres Nanotrap Microbiome A...
steps.instruction: Add 150ul Ceres Nanotrap Microbiome A Particle beads into 10mLs of wastewater and invert to mix

steps.title: Collect supernatant into new 1
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant into new 1.5mL tube and discard bead pellet. Continue right to extraction.

steps.title: Place 1
steps.instruction: Place 1.5mL tube on magnetic stand for 2 minutes or until beads are fully separated

steps.title: Incubate at room temp for 10...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temp for 10 minutes on a slow shaker

steps.title: Remove from magnet and add 500ul MagMax Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Remove from magnet and add 500ul MagMax Lysis Buffer. Resuspend the pellet and transfer to a 1.5mL tube.

steps.title: Prepare the following mixture in a 1.5mL conical tube
steps.instruction: Prepare the following mixture in a 1.5mL conical tube: Reagent Volume (ul) 1 Binding Solution 500 2 Beads 20 3 Proteinase K 10 4 Sample/Lysate 400 *Reagents (aside from sample) from MagMAX Viral/Pathogen Kit (A42352)

steps.title: Vortex to mix
steps.instruction: Vortex to mix

steps.title: Take off magnetic rack and add...
steps.instruction: Take off magnetic rack and add 1000ul MagMax Wash Buffer and resuspend bead pellet

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Place 1
steps.instruction: Place 1.5mL conical on magnetic rack for 2 minutes or until beads are fully separated

steps.title: Incubate for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 minutes

steps.title: With the tube still on the...
steps.instruction: With the tube still on the magnet, add 1000 μl of 80% EtOH, incubate for 30 seconds, and remove the EtOH wash.

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Place 1
steps.instruction: Place 1.5mL conical on magnetic rack for 2 minutes or until beads are fully separated

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnet
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnet. Add 50ul of MagMax Elution solution and pipette and vortex to resuspend

steps.title: Leave the plate on the magnet...
steps.instruction: Leave the plate on the magnet to air dry for 3 min.

steps.title: Repeat previous step for another 80% EtOH wash step
steps.instruction: Repeat previous step for another 80% EtOH wash step

steps.title: Place the tube onto the magnet
steps.instruction: Place the tube onto the magnet. Transfer the supernatant to the final tube. The sample is ready for downstream analysis or can be stored at -80⁰ C

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
